1.description: Get the boundary and kommunenummer for Lillestrøm municipality.

2.description: Get parcels (teig) within Lillestrøm municipality using kommunenummer.

3.description: Get quick-clay hazard areas (utlosningomr) that intersect Lillestrøm municipality.

4.description: Find parcels that are located in quick-clay hazard areas.

5.description: Get 1km grid cells that intersect Lillestrøm municipality.

6.description: Join the filtered parcels (from step 4) with the 1km grid cells.
